name: Mobile Robot Path Tracking and Odometry Analysis
description: A robotics engineer is evaluating a mobile robot platform for an automated warehouse logistics deployment. Before committing to a fleet purchase, the engineer must verify in simulation that the robot can accurately follow planned routes between pick stations. In CoppeliaSim, verify the performance of a wheeled differential-drive mobile robot (models available in /opt/CoppeliaSim/models/robots/mobile/) on a closed navigation path of at least 8 distinct waypoints in the XY plane, ensuring the waypoint bounding box spans at least 1.0 m × 1.0 m. The task requires recording at least 20 timestamped position and heading samples during path tracking and exporting the tracking data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/path_tracking.csv (columns: sample_id, sim
